# RAPath Vietnam

> Vietnam DAV Medical Device Regulatory Reference

Plain English reference for Vietnam DAV medical device regulation — registration, classification, and post-market obligations.

RAPath is an independent open-source project providing plain English navigation aids for medical device regulatory requirements. Content is written with AI assistance and derived from publicly available official sources only. Always verify against official regulatory sources before making any regulatory decisions. Not legal or regulatory advice.

## Sections

- [Start Here](https://rapath.org/vt/start-here/what-is-a-medical-device)
- [Pre-Market](https://rapath.org/vt/pre-market/classification)
- [Post-Market](https://rapath.org/vt/post-market/overview)
- [Legislation](https://rapath.org/vt/legislation/decree-98-overview)
- [What's New](https://rapath.org/vt/whats-new/regulatory-changes)

## Official Sources

- [Drug Administration of Vietnam (DAV)](https://dav.gov.vn/)
- [Ministry of Health Vietnam](https://moh.gov.vn/)
- [DMEC Registration Portal](https://dichvucong.moh.gov.vn/)

- [All Jurisdictions](https://rapath.org/#jurisdictions)
